tagline: Work with Zendesk Support API metadata from the command line.

global_flags.name: connection
global_flags.summary: Use a saved Zendesk connector credential/account scope.

commands.summary: Review Zendesk read candidates from the official OAS
commands.notes: Metadata inventory only. api_surface.json tracks 282 structured direct-read candidates and later lanes map durable collections to ETL streams or bounded direct reads.

commands.summary: Review Zendesk binary/file read candidates from the official OAS
commands.notes: Metadata inventory only. api_surface.json tracks 37 binary/file read candidates; #162 must define bounded size/path/download policy before execution.

commands.summary: Review Zendesk sensitive/admin write candidates from the official OAS
commands.source_cli_path: Zendesk OAS POST PUT PATCH operations
commands.risk: Zendesk mutation candidates remain blocked until typed reverse-ETL schemas, risk text, approval text, redaction, and policy gates are added.
commands.approval: Reverse ETL execution remains plan → preview → approval → execute.
commands.notes: Metadata inventory only. api_surface.json tracks 210 sensitive/admin reverse-ETL candidates.

commands.summary: Review Zendesk destructive write candidates from the official OAS
commands.risk: Zendesk DELETE operations are destructive and remain blocked until typed reverse-ETL schemas, risk text, approval text, redaction, and destructive confirmation are added.
commands.approval: Reverse ETL execution remains plan → preview → approval → execute with typed confirmation for destructive actions.
commands.notes: Metadata inventory only. api_surface.json tracks 85 destructive-action candidates.

commands.summary: Review deprecated Zendesk operations from the official OAS
commands.notes: Metadata inventory only. api_surface.json tracks 3 deprecated operation rows; #160 must confirm replacements or blockers.

help_topics.name: zendesk-auth
help_topics.summary: Zendesk authentication uses OAuth bearer tokens or email/API-token Basic auth with secrets stored in credentials.

help_topics.name: zendesk-safety
help_topics.summary: Zendesk writes remain reverse-ETL gated: plan, preview, approval, execute, with destructive confirmation where required.

help_topics.name: zendesk-operation-ledger
help_topics.summary: The initial operation ledger blocks all official OAS operations until later lanes map exact executable surfaces.
